content.fact_text: Production-ready DatabaseService for PostgreSQL with Knex, circuit breaking, and ACID-compliant transaction support.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a singleton PostgreSQL database connection pool using knex and pg. Includes Opossum circuit breaker for fault tolerance, Zod for configuration validation, and transaction management with deadlock retry logic. Implements graceful shutdown handling via SIGTERM/SIGINT.
interfaces: runTransaction<T>(work: (trx: Knex.Transaction) => Promise<T>, retries?: number): Promise<T>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a hardened, singleton interface for PostgreSQL database access with built-in resilience and observability.
